sme_leads.notes: Facebook and Instagram only with no standalone website despite active presence on busy Shirley High Street — missing all Google local search traffic.

dts.title: DVSA Test Wait Times Are at Record Highs — Here's What Learners Can Do
dts.hook: Show a regional DVSA wait-time map, narrate the pain, then reveal DTS as the fix — end with a CTA to drivingtestswap.uk

dts.title: I Got My Driving Test 3 Months Early — This Is How
dts.hook: First-person story from a DTS success story: the 6-month wait, the swap, the pass — raw and relatable, ends with a swipe-up or link in bio

athletics.title: Sprint Finisher — 4x60m, Walk Back, Repeat
athletics.hook: Film 4 reps at the track with walk-back recovery, voiceover: 'The session is short. The results aren't.' — post Mon morning to hit gym crowd

athletics.title: From 0 to 10 Pull-Ups — The 6-Week Daily Protocol
athletics.hook: Before/after or day-by-day montage at the gym showing the exact daily protocol, tagged with calisthenics and bodyweight training keywords

aimybiz.title: 5 Objections Your Sales Reps Will Hear This Week (and How CloseCoach Trains Them to Handle Each One)
aimybiz.hook: Each slide = one objection + a before/after rep response; final slide CTA to DM for a demo — targets sales managers scrolling LinkedIn during lunch

aimybiz.title: Watch CloseCoach Roleplay a Cold Call — Live AI Feedback in Real Time
aimybiz.hook: Screen-record a CloseCoach cold-call roleplay session with instant AI feedback, narrate over it as a live demo — stops the scroll for any sales manager
